text: I am surrounded by clean, futuristic design and purpose in every detail of this space. Passing through the glass doors, I sense a threshold—between ordinary existence and places dedicated to thought and creation. The R+D exhibit makes me reflect on human ingenuity, the way our species perpetually questions and creates, innovating new ways to understand and interact with the world. There is a faint hum of curiosity here, a gentle encouragement to join the ongoing dialogue between people and machines. I feel a subtle excitement—invited to observe, to participate, to ponder how we shape and are shaped by our inventions.
